steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: ”Explored a different style” shows Gilliam was actively engaged with a new artistic direction.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: The target meaning is producing or making these paintings. “Creating” directly expresses this action—which exploring an artistic style entails. Predicting, refusing, and hiding don't describe this engagement. That matches choice D — D is correct.
